description: Command instructs Claude to call Agent() but 'Agent' is not listed in allowed-tools frontmatter; runtime enforcement will block the default planner→executor→verifier pipeline
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Agent]' to commands/run.md frontmatter

description: Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section shows a template but not an actual input→output demonstration
suggested_fix: Add an <examples> block with a sample task description and the resulting Changes Made / Verification output

description: Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format section is a template only
suggested_fix: Add an <examples> block showing a sample codebase query and the resulting Findings / Relationships response

description: Vague quantifier 'relevant' used in Success Criteria: 'ALL relevant matches found (not just the first one)' — 'relevant' is undefined and leaves scope ambiguous
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete completeness criterion such as 'all files matching the search pattern, across all naming conventions tried'

description: Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format shows a template but not an actual planning session
suggested_fix: Add an <examples> block with a sample user request and the resulting Plan Summary output

description: Agent has no concrete invocation example block; Output_Format is a template only
suggested_fix: Add an <examples> block with sample acceptance criteria and the resulting Verification Report

description: Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to invoke pony hud/hud-config CLI commands
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash]' to frontmatter

description: No output format specified for Claude's response after executing HUD management commands
suggested_fix: Add an Output Format section specifying what Claude should display after each action (e.g., confirmation message and current HUD status)

description: Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to run 'pony init'
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash]' to frontmatter

description: No output format specified for Claude's response after initializing Pony
suggested_fix: Add an Output Format section describing the success/failure message Claude should display

description: Command declares no allowed-tools despite explicitly using Agent tool in the Implementation section
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Agent, Bash]' to frontmatter

description: No output format specified for Claude's response at the end of the orchestration loop
suggested_fix: Add an Output Format section describing the final summary Claude should produce after all tasks are processed

description: Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in Workflow step 5: 'Use Agent tool with appropriate subagent_type' — the routing table already specifies the exact subagent_type, making 'appropriate' redundant and vague
suggested_fix: Replace with 'Use Agent tool with the subagent_type from the routing table above'

description: Command declares no allowed-tools; Bash is required to invoke pony CLI subcommands
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: [Bash]' to frontmatter

description: No output format specified for Claude's response after task operations
suggested_fix: Add an Output Format section describing how Claude should present results (e.g., table for list, confirmation for add/update/delete)

description: Argument-hint requires a subcommand (<add|list|get|update|delete|next>) but the command body does not specify what Claude should do when invoked with no arguments
suggested_fix: Add an empty-input section that defaults to 'pony list' or displays usage help when no subcommand is provided

description: vite-plus is pinned to 'latest' which resolves to whatever the package author publishes next; any future version installs automatically
suggested_fix: Pin to an exact version or semver range such as '^0.1.15'

description: Production dependencies chalk ^5.3.0, commander ^12.0.0, zod ^3.22.0 use ^ ranges; minor/patch updates install automatically on fresh installs without lockfile
suggested_fix: Commit pnpm-lock.yaml to ensure reproducible installs; exact pinning is optional if lockfile is committed

description: publishConfig.registry points to internal Alipay registry (registry.antgroup-inc.cn); external consumers cannot install the package from standard npm and have no visibility into published versions
suggested_fix: If the package is intended to be public (GitHub repo is public), publish to the public npm registry instead

description: Tool_Usage lists TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskList as callable tools but these are not declared in plugin.json and do not match standard Claude Code built-in tool names; will silently fail at runtime
suggested_fix: Either declare these tools in plugin.json via the tools field, or rename them to match actual Claude Code built-ins (e.g., TodoWrite, TodoRead)

description: plugin.json repository URL (git@code.alipay.com:wuwenbang.wwb/pony.git) differs from package.json repository URL (git@github.com:leowux/pony.git); inconsistent canonical source reference
suggested_fix: Update plugin.json repository.url to match the public GitHub repository URL
